summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the requested Golden Key Car Rental platform. Most requirements have visible implementation evidence across frontend components and the backend Motoko actor. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps or are not clearly implemented, particularly around pickup/return location filters, the availability calendar on the car detail page, early payment discount logic, revenue monthly breakdown, and refund notes processing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Filter panel must include pickup location and return location fields
missing_requirements.reason: The CarFilterPanel.tsx shows search, dates, category, transmission, and max price filters, but no pickup location or return location filter fields are visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Car detail page must show a real-time availability calendar
missing_requirements.reason: No availability calendar component is visible in the diff. The CarPhotoGallery and other components exist, but no calendar component for availability is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Pricing calculator must show early payment discount when user selects full upfront payment
missing_requirements.reason: No early payment discount toggle or logic is visible in any of the diffed files. The backend Booking type and frontend booking flow components do not reference early payment discount.

missing_requirements.requirement: Revenue report must display total revenue by month (monthly totals breakdown)
missing_requirements.reason: The RevenueReportPanel.tsx shows total revenue and per-car breakdown, but no monthly breakdown chart or table is present. The requirement explicitly asks for total revenue by month.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin booking management must support processing refund notes
missing_requirements.reason: The BookingManagementTable.tsx shows status changes but no refund notes field or processing is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Car detail page must show a specifications section
missing_requirements.reason: No CarSpecs or specifications component is visible in the diffed files. The car model in the backend also lacks specification fields beyond category and transmission.

hallucinated_features.description: User approval and rejection system with ApprovalStatus managed by admins
hallucinated_features.reason: The UserManagementTable.tsx implements approve/reject actions using ApprovalStatus and useSetApproval/useListApprovals hooks, and the backend includes a UserApproval mixin. No such user approval workflow was requested in the build spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Stripe configuration panel in admin dashboard allowing admin to input Stripe secret key and allowed countries
hallucinated_features.reason: The StripeConfigPanel.tsx allows admin to configure Stripe secret key and allowed countries from the UI. The build spec only requires Stripe as the payment gateway for bookings — no admin-configurable Stripe setup panel was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: PaymentSuccess and PaymentFailure pages as separate routes
hallucinated_features.reason: The App.tsx defines /payment-success and /payment-failure routes with separate page components. The build spec requires a single-page booking flow; separate payment result pages were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Blob storage mixin included in the backend actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The backend includes MixinStorage and blob-storage/Mixin imports. No file or blob storage feature was requested in the build spec.
